text:
Market today: Mixed signals dominate. Chips are rebounding (headline 8) while Mag7 struggles (headline 3) — that divergence historically precedes broader weakness. A bear market signal is flashing at 67% odds (headline 1). Your tech/chip-heavy, margin book sits right in the crosshairs.

Your holdings: AVGO is your biggest concern — down 14.66%, your largest position, and on TRIM. On margin, that hole compounds fast; stop is 336, watch it closely. PLTR is flagged SELL, down 11.11% — that's real money bleeding with no clear floor yet. SPCX is a brand-new, very volatile IPO with limited price history; it's only up 6.62% but can swing hard either way — margin makes any reversal punishing. SPAL adds 2x leveraged decay risk on top of SpaceX volatility.

Watch: 1) AVGO holding above 336 stop — a break there on margin is ugly. 2) Whether the chip rebound has legs or fades, which sets the tone for SMH and your whole book.

Bottom line: Your two underwater flagged names plus a new volatile IPO on margin is a dangerous combo if the market rolls over — trim or stop out before it decides for you.
